title: Create the stories on webpages on ETCETER4.com
content:
Create the stories on webpages on ETCETER4.com

Build each word in cells (similar to excel[you’ve done this in the past])

Create algorithms that change the words on each reload, using different languages for each word. So the sentence is maintained, but the words themselves change!
context: From document: Create the stories on webpages on ETCETER4.com
